items.title: In awe of SpaceX and its story
items.title_zh: 对 SpaceX 及其故事感到敬畏
items.description: In awe of SpaceX and its story - past, present and the future. You can think about it in 10+ different ways and continue re-blowing your mind in circles. Huge congrats to the team! 🚀
items.description_zh: 对 SpaceX 及其故事——过去、现在和未来感到敬畏。你可以用 10 多种不同的方式来思考它，并继续不断地重复你的想法。衷心祝贺团队！ 🚀
